TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Kari Mawri (Kari Mawri: te reo MńĀori, uxe de te reo "kari")we, kari tnpusu na seediq Mawri meniq Aotearoa (Nyosilan), kari qnlhangan na Aotearoa uri. Pneeyah Taypingyang ka seediq Mawri, bobo betaq Aotearoa de, ini hari kpriyux ka hnghengak na kari daha, mngaangal kari pneeyah alang ini pntena, mkela mbahang ma mpprengo ka dseediq Mawri. Pnskngalan Hnghengak Hengak Bubu Niqan hengak bubu puto daha ma, niqan hengak bubu qnedis uri, so ka: kńďkńď 'armpit' ‚ąľ keke 'cake' kńĀkńĀ 'bird species' ‚ąľ kaka 'garment' kŇćkŇć 'tui, bird species' ‚ąľ koko 'shovel' kńękńę 'speak' ‚ąľ kiki 'kick' kŇękŇę 'pigeon' ‚ąľ kuku 'mussel' Hengak Laqi Patis Uka patis cbeyo ka seediq Mawri. Bobo na de, meeyah ka seediq Piritana Nui di. Ngalan daha patis Latin matis kari Mawri. Wano 15 hengak ka nniqan na kari Mawri, so ka: hengak bubu: a, e, i, o, u (+ ńĀ, ńď, ńę, Ňć, Ňę) hengak laqi: h, k, m, n, ng, p, r, t, w, wh "r" we hengak plhelah, "wh" we uxe de , ani si niqan (h ∑) ma uri. Dndulan kari Mntena kari Seediq, niqan dndulan kari ini pntena ka kari Mawri, so hari kari Tainui, Waikato, Ngai Tuhue... Nii ka pnsseengan dndulan kari ini pntena: Duma kari Mawri Ko te katoa o ngńĀ tńĀngata i te whanaungatanga mai e wńĀtea ana i ngńĀ here katoa; e tauriterite ana hoki ngńĀ mana me ngńĀ tika. E whakawhiwhia ana hoki ki a rńĀtou te ngńĀkau whai whakaaro me te hinengaro mŇćhio ki te tika me te hńď, ńĀ e tika ana kia meinga te mahi a tńďtahi ki tńďtahi me ma roto atu i te wairua o te noho tahi, anŇć he teina he tuakana i ringa i te whakaaro kotahi. "Kana seediq bobo dheran nii we, traguh kndalax pnttingan ta; mntena ka beyax pusu ta. Pniqan gnkela ka knkingal seediq, kiya ka, asi ta ka mntena mptswayi mggaalu ma mptbale msuupu." (Tg1 patis, Kari Beyax Pusu Bobo Dheran)
S.PHON: ka…ĺi maw…ĺi (ka…ĺi maw…ĺi: t…ô …ĺ…ôo m*o…ĺi, ux…ô d…ô t…ô …ĺ…ôo "ka…ĺi")w…ô, ka…ĺi tnpusu na s…ô…ôdiq maw…ĺi m…ôniq aot…ôa…ĺoa (njosilan), ka…ĺi qnlńßaŇčan na aot…ôa…ĺoa u…ĺi. pn…ô…ôańß tajpiŇčjaŇč ka s…ô…ôdiq maw…ĺi, bobo b…ôtaq aot…ôa…ĺoa d…ô, ini ńßa…ĺi kp…ĺijux ka ńßŇčńß…ôŇčak na ka…ĺi dańßa, mŇčaaŇčal ka…ĺi pn…ô…ôańß alaŇč ini pnt…ôna, mk…ôla mbańßaŇč ma mpp…ĺ…ôŇčo ka ds…ô…ôdiq maw…ĺi. pnskŇčalan ńßŇčńß…ôŇčak ńß…ôŇčak bubu niqan ńß…ôŇčak bubu puto dańßa ma, niqan ńß…ôŇčak bubu qn…ôdis u…ĺi, so ka: k*k* 'a…ĺmpit' * k…ôk…ô ' ¶ak…ô' k*k* 'bi…ĺd sp…ô ¶i…ôs' * kaka 'ga…ĺm…ônt' k*k* 'tui, bi…ĺd sp…ô ¶i…ôs' * koko 'sńßo*…ôl' k*k* 'sp…ôak' * kiki 'ki ¶k' k*k* 'pig…ôon' * kuku 'muss…ôl' ńß…ôŇčak laqi patis uka patis ¶b…ôo ka s…ô…ôdiq maw…ĺi. bobo na d…ô, m…ô…ôańß ka s…ô…ôdiq pi…ĺitana nui di. Ňčalan dańßa patis latin matis ka…ĺi maw…ĺi. wano ** ńß…ôŇčak ka nniqan na ka…ĺi maw…ĺi, so ka: ńß…ôŇčak bubu: a, …ô, i, o, u (+ *, *, *, *, *) ńß…ôŇčak laqi: ńß, k, m, n, Ňč, p, …ĺ, t, w, wńß "…ĺ" w…ô ńß…ôŇčak plńß…ôlańß, "wńß" w…ô ux…ô d…ô , ani si niqan (ńß*) ma u…ĺi. dndulan ka…ĺi mnt…ôna ka…ĺi s…ô…ôdiq, niqan dndulan ka…ĺi ini pnt…ôna ka ka…ĺi maw…ĺi, so ńßa…ĺi ka…ĺi tainui, waikato, Ňčai tuńßu…ô... nii ka pnss…ô…ôŇčan dndulan ka…ĺi ini pnt…ôna: duma ka…ĺi maw…ĺi ko t…ô katoa o Ňč* t*Ňčata i t…ô wńßanauŇčataŇča mai …ô w*t…ôa ana i Ňč* ńß…ô…ĺ…ô katoa; …ô tau…ĺit…ô…ĺit…ô ana ńßoki Ňč* mana m…ô Ňč* tika. …ô wńßakawńßiwńßia ana ńßoki ki a …ĺ*tou t…ô Ňč*kau wńßai wńßakaa…ĺo m…ô t…ô ńßin…ôŇča…ĺo m*ńßio ki t…ô tika m…ô t…ô ńß*, * …ô tika ana kia m…ôiŇča t…ô mańßi a t*tańßi ki t*tańßi m…ô ma …ĺoto atu i t…ô wai…ĺua o t…ô nońßo tańßi, an* ńß…ô t…ôina ńß…ô tuakana i …ĺiŇča i t…ô wńßakaa…ĺo kotańßi. "kana s…ô…ôdiq bobo dńß…ô…ĺan nii w…ô, t…ĺaguńß kndalax pnttiŇčan ta; mnt…ôna ka b…ôax pusu ta. pniqan gnk…ôla ka knkiŇčal s…ô…ôdiq, kija ka, asi ta ka mnt…ôna mptswaji mggaalu ma mptbal…ô msuupu." (tg* patis, ka…ĺi b…ôax pusu bobo dńß…ô…ĺan)
S.FORM: Kari Mawri (Kari Mawri: te reo MńĀori, uxe de te reo "kari")we, kari tnpusu na seediq Mawri meniq Aotearoa (Nyosilan), kari qnlhangan na Aotearoa uri. Pneeyah Taypingyang ka seediq Mawri, bobo betaq Aotearoa de, ini hari kpriyux ka hnghengak na kari daha, mngaangal kari pneeyah alang ini pntena, mkela mbahang ma mpprengo ka dseediq Mawri. Pnskngalan Hnghengak Hengak Bubu Niqan hengak bubu puto daha ma, niqan hengak bubu qnedis uri, so ka: kńďkńď 'armpit' ‚ąľ keke 'cake' kńĀkńĀ 'bird species' ‚ąľ kaka 'garment' kŇćkŇć 'tui, bird species' ‚ąľ koko 'shovel' kńękńę 'speak' ‚ąľ kiki 'kick' kŇękŇę 'pigeon' ‚ąľ kuku 'mussel' Hengak Laqi Patis Uka patis cbeyo ka seediq Mawri. Bobo na de, meeyah ka seediq Piritana Nui di. Ngalan daha patis Latin matis kari Mawri. Wano 15 hengak ka nniqan na kari Mawri, so ka: hengak bubu: a, e, i, o, u (+ ńĀ, ńď, ńę, Ňć, Ňę) hengak laqi: h, k, m, n, ng, p, r, t, w, wh "r" we hengak plhelah, "wh" we uxe de , ani si niqan (h ∑) ma uri. Dndulan kari Mntena kari Seediq, niqan dndulan kari ini pntena ka kari Mawri, so hari kari Tainui, Waikato, Ngai Tuhue... Nii ka pnsseengan dndulan kari ini pntena: Duma kari Mawri Ko te katoa o ngńĀ tńĀngata i te whanaungatanga mai e wńĀtea ana i ngńĀ here katoa; e tauriterite ana hoki ngńĀ mana me ngńĀ tika. E whakawhiwhia ana hoki ki a rńĀtou te ngńĀkau whai whakaaro me te hinengaro mŇćhio ki te tika me te hńď, ńĀ e tika ana kia meinga te mahi a tńďtahi ki tńďtahi me ma roto atu i te wairua o te noho tahi, anŇć he teina he tuakana i ringa i te whakaaro kotahi. "Kana seediq bobo dheran nii we, traguh kndalax pnttingan ta; mntena ka beyax pusu ta. Pniqan gnkela ka knkingal seediq, kiya ka, asi ta ka mntena mptswayi mggaalu ma mptbale msuupu." (Tg1 patis, Kari Beyax Pusu Bobo Dheran)
S.PHON: ka…ĺi maw…ĺi (ka…ĺi maw…ĺi: t…ô …ĺ…ôo m*o…ĺi, ux…ô d…ô t…ô …ĺ…ôo "ka…ĺi")w…ô, ka…ĺi tnpusu na s…ô…ôdiq maw…ĺi m…ôniq aot…ôa…ĺoa (njosilan), ka…ĺi qnlńßaŇčan na aot…ôa…ĺoa u…ĺi. pn…ô…ôańß tajpiŇčjaŇč ka s…ô…ôdiq maw…ĺi, bobo b…ôtaq aot…ôa…ĺoa d…ô, ini ńßa…ĺi kp…ĺijux ka ńßŇčńß…ôŇčak na ka…ĺi dańßa, mŇčaaŇčal ka…ĺi pn…ô…ôańß alaŇč ini pnt…ôna, mk…ôla mbańßaŇč ma mpp…ĺ…ôŇčo ka ds…ô…ôdiq maw…ĺi. pnskŇčalan ńßŇčńß…ôŇčak ńß…ôŇčak bubu niqan ńß…ôŇčak bubu puto dańßa ma, niqan ńß…ôŇčak bubu qn…ôdis u…ĺi, so ka: k*k* 'a…ĺmpit' * k…ôk…ô ' ¶ak…ô' k*k* 'bi…ĺd sp…ô ¶i…ôs' * kaka 'ga…ĺm…ônt' k*k* 'tui, bi…ĺd sp…ô ¶i…ôs' * koko 'sńßo*…ôl' k*k* 'sp…ôak' * kiki 'ki ¶k' k*k* 'pig…ôon' * kuku 'muss…ôl' ńß…ôŇčak laqi patis uka patis ¶b…ôo ka s…ô…ôdiq maw…ĺi. bobo na d…ô, m…ô…ôańß ka s…ô…ôdiq pi…ĺitana nui di. Ňčalan dańßa patis latin matis ka…ĺi maw…ĺi. wano ** ńß…ôŇčak ka nniqan na ka…ĺi maw…ĺi, so ka: ńß…ôŇčak bubu: a, …ô, i, o, u (+ *, *, *, *, *) ńß…ôŇčak laqi: ńß, k, m, n, Ňč, p, …ĺ, t, w, wńß "…ĺ" w…ô ńß…ôŇčak plńß…ôlańß, "wńß" w…ô ux…ô d…ô , ani si niqan (ńß*) ma u…ĺi. dndulan ka…ĺi mnt…ôna ka…ĺi s…ô…ôdiq, niqan dndulan ka…ĺi ini pnt…ôna ka ka…ĺi maw…ĺi, so ńßa…ĺi ka…ĺi tainui, waikato, Ňčai tuńßu…ô... nii ka pnss…ô…ôŇčan dndulan ka…ĺi ini pnt…ôna: duma ka…ĺi maw…ĺi ko t…ô katoa o Ňč* t*Ňčata i t…ô wńßanauŇčataŇča mai …ô w*t…ôa ana i Ňč* ńß…ô…ĺ…ô katoa; …ô tau…ĺit…ô…ĺit…ô ana ńßoki Ňč* mana m…ô Ňč* tika. …ô wńßakawńßiwńßia ana ńßoki ki a …ĺ*tou t…ô Ňč*kau wńßai wńßakaa…ĺo m…ô t…ô ńßin…ôŇča…ĺo m*ńßio ki t…ô tika m…ô t…ô ńß*, * …ô tika ana kia m…ôiŇča t…ô mańßi a t*tańßi ki t*tańßi m…ô ma …ĺoto atu i t…ô wai…ĺua o t…ô nońßo tańßi, an* ńß…ô t…ôina ńß…ô tuakana i …ĺiŇča i t…ô wńßakaa…ĺo kotańßi. "kana s…ô…ôdiq bobo dńß…ô…ĺan nii w…ô, t…ĺaguńß kndalax pnttiŇčan ta; mnt…ôna ka b…ôax pusu ta. pniqan gnk…ôla ka knkiŇčal s…ô…ôdiq, kija ka, asi ta ka mnt…ôna mptswaji mggaalu ma mptbal…ô msuupu." (tg* patis, ka…ĺi b…ôax pusu bobo dńß…ô…ĺan)
